title: How the UK’s Options for Rebuilding Ties With Europe Stack Up
title_cn: 英国与欧洲重建关系的选择如何叠加
summary: Leaving the European Union has cost the UK 2% to 4% of forgone economic output but almost half can be recovered by improving trade with the bloc, according to analysis by Bloomberg Economics for the 10-year anniversary of the Brexit referendum.

title: Apple's Siri AI Has Edge Over Rivals, IDC Says (Correct)
title_cn: IDC 表示，苹果的 Siri AI 比竞争对手更具优势（正确）
summary: IDC Senior Research Director Nabila Popal says Apple's Siri AI holds two key advantages over other AI models: its access to personal context and strong focus on privacy and security. She also says Apple has caught up on AI strategy this year and its new features will enhance user experience. (Corrects description of AI model features.) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Delivers Off-Cycle Rate Hike to Temper Market Rout
title_cn: 印度尼西亚非周期加息以缓和市场暴跌
summary: Indonesia’s central bank unexpectedly raised its benchmark interest rate in an off-cycle decision, seeking to shore up the rupiah after a selloff rattled the nation’s currency and bonds.

title: Korean Stocks Jump 8% as Chip Shares Rebound After AI Selloff
title_cn: 人工智能抛售后芯片股反弹，韩国股市上涨 8%
summary: Memory chipmaker shares led a rebound in South Korean stocks, demonstrating investors aren’t quite ready to throw in the towel on the artificial intelligence boom.

title: Iran, Israel Pledge to End Attacks That Threatened Talks
title_cn: 伊朗和以色列承诺停止威胁会谈的袭击
summary: Iran and Israel agreed to ease strikes against each other after a flare-up in violence threatened to derail peace negotiations and led President Donald Trump to appeal for de-escalation. Bloomberg's Dan Williams and Jill Disis report. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CIMB Says ‘Good Time’ to Invest in Battered Indonesia, Seeks M&A
title_cn: 联昌国际集团称投资遭受重创的印尼“好时机”并寻求并购
summary: CIMB Group Holdings Bhd., Malaysia’s second-biggest bank, says it’s seeking merger and acquisition opportunities in neighboring Indonesia despite a slump in investor confidence in Southeast Asia’s biggest economy.

title: Australia's Far-Right One Nation Tops Poll
title_cn: 澳大利亚极右翼国家在民意调查中名列前茅
summary:
Australia's populist One Nation party has surged past Labor in a nationwide opinion poll for the first time, as Prime Minister Anthony Albanese’s popularity hits fresh lows. Redbridge Director of Strategy and Analytics Kos Samaras discusses Australia's political landscape and voter dissatisfaction on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade."
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Logistics Firm GLP Aims for $2 Billion of Asset Sales This Year
title_cn: 物流公司 GLP 今年的资产出售目标为 20 亿美元
summary: GLP Pte. told some bondholders during meetings in recent days that it aims to sell around $2 billion of assets this year, according to people familiar with the matter, as the logistics operator prepares for an initial public offering.

title: Stocks Extend Rebound After AI Selloff, Oil Drops: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 人工智能抛售、油价下跌后股市延续反弹：市场总结
summary: A rebound in equities that began on Wall Street extended into Asia, as cheaper valuations for artificial intelligence shares lured investors. Crude oil declined as tensions in the Middle East eased.

title: Trump’s $100,000 H-1B Visa Fee Rejected by Judge
title_cn: 法官拒绝特朗普 10 万美元的 H-1B 签证费
summary: A federal judge struck down a $100,000 fee President Donald Trump ordered for H-1B visa applications, providing a reprieve for US technology companies that rely on hiring skilled foreign workers. Bloomberg's Sankalp Phartiyal breaks down the developments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Leveraged ETF Goes Haywire in Korea With Wrong-Way 40% Moves
title_cn: 杠杆 ETF 在韩国陷入混乱，40% 的错误走势
summary: A leveraged exchange-traded fund tracking SK Hynix Inc. deviated sharply from the underlying stock’s move for a second day, underscoring the risk of investing in such products that have attracted strong retail interest.

title: Taiwan Five-Year Yields at Highest Since 2008 on Cash, Rate View
title_cn: 从现金和利率角度看，台湾五年期收益率创 2008 年以来最高水平
summary: Yields on Taiwan’s five-year government bonds jumped to their highest level since 2008 as tighter banking-system liquidity and growing expectations of higher interest rates weighed on demand for local debt.

title: India’s RBI Offers Discounted FX Swaps at 1.5% to Draw Inflows
title_cn: 印度储备银行提供 1.5% 的折扣外汇掉期以吸引资金流入
summary: The Reserve Bank of India will offer state-run firms a concessional foreign exchange swap facility, allowing them to hedge overseas borrowings at roughly half of the prevailing market costs, according to some analysts.

title: Copper Falls With Rate Hike Prospects, AI Stocks Risk in Focus
title_cn: 铜价因加息前景而下跌，人工智能股风险成为焦点
summary: Copper declined as expectations for a US rate hike and risks around artificial intelligence stocks reduced appetite for industrial metals.

title: Bombardier Invests $78M to Expand Singapore Service Hub
title_cn: 庞巴迪投资 7800 万美元扩建新加坡服务中心
summary: Paul Sislian, Executive Vice President, Aircraft Sales and Bombardier Aftermarket Services, says it will nearly double the company's Singapore service footprint. The Canadian business jet manufacturer says this expansion represents a significant bet on Asia-Pacific, creating hundreds of highly skilled aerospace jobs. Paul speaks with Haslinda Amin on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CIMB CEO: Looking at Growth Opportunities in Indonesia
title_cn: 联昌国际集团首席执行官：展望印尼的增长机会
summary: Novan Amirudin, Group CEO of CIMB Group, says Malaysia's second-largest bank is looking at growth opportunities in Indonesia. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Invest Malaysia' in Kuala Lumpur. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Falls as Israel and Iran Halt Hostilities That Risked Talks
title_cn: 以色列和伊朗停止敌对行动，导致谈判面临风险，油价下跌
summary: Oil declined after Israel and Iran agreed to end attacks against each other following an escalation of violence that threatened to derail efforts to end the war in the Middle East.

title: Indonesia’s Bond Selloff Extends as Five-Year Note Yield Surges
title_cn: 随着五年期国债收益率飙升，印尼债券抛售加剧
summary: Indonesia’s debt market selloff deepened as the nation’s five-year bond yield climbed to the highest level in more than six years.

title: China’s Oil Imports Plunge to Eight-Year Low on War Disruptions
title_cn: 战争干扰导致中国石油进口跌至八年低点
summary: China’s buying of oil from overseas slumped to the lowest in more than eight years last month as the Iran war crimped supply and Beijing held off scrambling for replacement barrels.

title: China’s Aluminum Exports Surge to Fill Global Shortfall From War
title_cn: 中国铝出口激增填补全球战争造成的缺口
summary: Chinese aluminum exports surged in May, helping fill a global shortage caused by war in the Middle East. Crude oil imports continued to slump, dropping to an eight-year low, as the conflict chokes shipments from major producers.

title: Japan Still Can’t Escape the Old Normal
title_cn: 日本仍无法摆脱旧常态
summary: The BOJ has good reasons to hike, but is dragging its feet. A weak yen suits many people.

title: Fast Retail Firm Zepto Files for Biggest India IPO This Year
title_cn: 迅销公司 Zepto 申请今年印度最大的 IPO
summary: Rapid-commerce company Zepto Ltd. has filed updated paperwork for what’s set to be India’s biggest initial public offering this year, bringing to market one of the key companies in a fast-growing industry.

title: China Coking Coal Slides After Report on Push to Maintain Output
title_cn: 报告推动维持产量后中国焦煤下滑
summary: Chinese coking coal futures extended declines following a local media report that authorities in Shaanxi asked miners to maintain output, after a deadly accident in neighboring Shanxi last month raised supply and safety concerns.

title: World Cup Season Spurs Citi’s Bearish Call on Rates Volatility
title_cn: 世界杯赛季刺激花旗对利率波动的悲观预期
summary: Traders may have another reason to worry less about bond volatility spiking this summer: the FIFA World Cup.

title: GSK in Talks to Buy Nuvalent for More Than $9 Billion: FT
title_cn: 葛兰素史克 (GSK) 正在洽谈以超过 90 亿美元收购 Nuvalent：FT
summary: GSK Plc is in discussions to purchase cancer treatment maker Nuvalent Inc. for between $9 billion and $10 billion, the Financial Times reported, citing unidentified people familiar with the matter.

title: Maybank Handles $4.9 Billion Deals for Singapore, Malaysia Hub
title_cn: 马来亚银行为新加坡和马来西亚中心处理 49 亿美元的交易
summary: alayan Banking Bhd said the Johor-Singapore special economic zone will drive further expansion, with Malaysia’s biggest lender having facilitated about 20 billion ringgit ($4.9 billion) in financing and investments in the area in the past couple of years.

title: Citadel Securities Expands India Trading and Engineering Teams
title_cn: Citadel 证券扩大印度交易和工程团队
summary: Citadel Securities LLC, the market-making firm founded by billionaire Ken Griffin, is hiring more engineers and traders in India, as it seeks to expand in one of the world’s fastest-growing financial markets.

title: Bain Capital Makes Non-Binding Bid for Australia’s oOh!Media
title_cn: 贝恩资本对澳大利亚 oOh!Media 提出不具约束力的收购要约
summary: Bain Capital has joined the pack of bidders for oOh!Media Group, the Australian outdoor advertising company said.

title: Elon Musk Shows Detailed Design of AI Data Center Satellite
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克展示人工智能数据中心卫星的详细设计
summary: Elon Musk unveiled a more detailed look at an initial version of an AI data center satellite SpaceX plans to build, providing fresh insight into the ambitious project driving the company’s highly anticipated initial public offering.

title: Xi Receives Lavish Welcome From Kim in North Korea
title_cn: 习近平在朝鲜受到金正恩的盛情欢迎
summary:
President Xi Jinping arrived in Pyongyang to an elaborate welcome on his first visit to the reclusive nation in seven years

In a meeting with Kim Jong Un, Xi vowed to deepen China's ties with North Korea. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Paytm Plans 10% Staff Boost in AI Pivot With Some Roles Cut
title_cn: Paytm 计划在 AI 支点上增加 10% 的员工并削减一些职位
summary: Indian fintech pioneer Paytm is set to hire about 4,000 people over the next nine months, part of a pivot aimed at expanding its merchant network and artificial intelligence-driven product offerings.

title: MSIA: Malaysia 2026 Semiconductor Exports Can Hit $197B
title_cn: MSIA：马来西亚2026年半导体出口额可达$197B
summary: Malaysia Semiconductor Industry Association President Wong Siew Hai believes the country's semiconductor exports can hit about $200 billion this year. He speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Invest Malaysia' in Kuala Lumpur. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Maybank Handles $4.9B Deals For Singapore, Malaysia Hub
title_cn: Maybank 为新加坡、马来西亚中心处理 $4.9B 交易
summary: Khairussaleh Ramli, President and Group CEO at Maybank, says the Johor-Singapore special economic zone will drive further expansion, with Malaysia’s biggest lender having facilitated about $4.9 billion in financing and investments in the area in the past couple of years. He speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts from the sidelines of the Invest Malaysia conference in Kuala Lumpur.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tencent Is Marketing Bonds That May Raise Up to $4.5 Billion
title_cn: 腾讯正在发行债券，融资金额可能高达 45 亿美元
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. began marketing dollar and yuan bonds in an offering that could raise as much as $4.5 billion, people familiar with the matter said, an upward shift from initial thinking following discussions with investors.

title: Bursa Malaysia Taps AI Demand for Growth
title_cn: 马来西亚证券交易所利用人工智能需求促进增长
summary: Bursa Malaysia CEO Fad’l Mohamed says the AI buildout has supported the growth of the stock exchange. He speaks with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of the Invest Malaysia conference in Kuala Lumpur. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Delays Siri AI for iPhone Users in the EU, Says Regulators Refusing to Engage
title_cn: 监管机构拒绝参与 苹果推迟向欧盟 iPhone 用户提供 Siri AI
summary: Apple Inc. said it isn’t currently able to launch Siri AI, its redesigned digital assistant, on iPhones, Apple Watches or iPads in the European Union, marking the company’s latest standoff with the continent’s antitrust watchdog.

title: Apple’s iOS 27 Is Filled With Hints About Its Upcoming Foldable iPhone
title_cn: 苹果的 iOS 27 充满了关于即将推出的可折叠 iPhone 的暗示
summary: Apple Inc.’s iOS 27 and related software updates offer the clearest public signs yet of the company’s upcoming foldable iPhone, revealing references to folding hardware and new features designed for larger, more flexible displays.

title: Apollo Wraps Up $35 Billion Chip Deal for Anthropic
title_cn: Apollo 为 Anthropic 完成 350 亿美元芯片交易
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. and Blackstone Inc. have finalized a $35 billion financing package for Anthropic PBC to expand its AI infrastructure, marking the latest mega-deal in the artificial intelligence race.

title: Musk’s xAI Taps Starlink Staffer to Run Grok Training Team
title_cn: 马斯克的 xAI 聘请 Starlink 员工来管理 Grok 培训团队
summary: Elon Musk’s xAI has brought over an executive from SpaceX’s Starlink satellite-internet service to run the team that trains its Grok chatbot, replacing college-aged engineer Diego Pasini, according to an internal note seen by Bloomberg News.

title: Fujikura Is Raising Prices on Data Center Cables to Beat Outlook
title_cn: 藤仓正在提高数据中心电缆的价格以应对前景
summary: Fujikura Ltd. is on a track to beat its outlook thanks to sustained demand for fiber-optic cables essential for AI data centers and a plan to raise prices, according to its top executive.

title: OpenAI Files Confidentially for IPO
title_cn: OpenAI 秘密提交 IPO 文件
summary: OpenAI, the maker of ChatGPT, filed confidentially for an IPO, joining artificial intelligence rivals in tapping public markets to fund ambitious growth plans. Bloomberg's Michael Hytha has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK to Repay Visa Fees to Growth Firms Which Recruit Abroad
title_cn: 英国将向在海外招聘的成长型企业偿还签证费
summary: The UK government will reimburse visa fees incurred by fast-growing companies when they recruit talent from abroad, in an effort to make Britain a friendlier environment for technology firms.

title: Sri Lanka Emerging as a New Base for Asia’s Scam Networks
title_cn: 斯里兰卡成为亚洲诈骗网络的新基地
summary: The crackdown on scam compounds in Cambodia is leading some gangs to relocate to beach resorts and office buildings in Sri Lanka, in what may be the next phase of one of the world’s fastest-growing criminal industries.

title: Wall Street Claws Back Friday’s Losses | The Close 6/8/2026
title_cn: 华尔街收复周五跌幅|收盘价 6/8/2026
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Seaport Research Partners Chief Equity Strategist Jonathan Golub, FuelCell Energy President & CEO Jason Few, Morgan Stanley Research Senior Analyst, Healthcare Services Erin Wright, Siri Co-Founder & Former CEO Dag Kittlaus, Ingredion CEO James Zallie, Pictet Research Institute Head Maria Vassalou, Research Affiliates Chief Investment Officer Jim Masturzo, Wellington Late-Stage Growth Heat Matthew Witheiler, NYNJ Host Committee for the FIFA 2026 World Cup Chief Executive Officer Alex Lasry, & Former CEO of Modell’s Sporting Goods Mitch Modell. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Files Confidentially for IPO
title_cn: OpenAI 秘密提交 IPO 文件
summary: OpenAI filed confidentially for an IPO with the SEC, working with Goldman Sachs Group and Morgan Stanley on a potential listing. Romaine Bostick reports on "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Investors Give Lukewarm Reaction to New Siri, AI Platform
title_cn: 苹果投资者对新的 Siri 和人工智能平台反应冷淡
summary: Apple Inc. used its Worldwide Developers Conference to lay the foundation for a new generation of products, making the case that it can overcome years of snags to compete in the AI era.

title: Cipher Sells Junk Debt for Amazon-Tied Data Center Project
title_cn: Cipher 为亚马逊数据中心项目出售垃圾债务
summary: Cipher Digital Inc. raised $810 million from a junk-bond sale to help fund a data center tied to Amazon.com Inc., adding to a wave of riskier debt financing backing the artificial intelligence infrastructure boom.

title: SpaceX IPO Forces Investors to Bet on Musk’s Entangled AI Empire
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股迫使投资者押注马斯克错综复杂的人工智能帝国
summary: The boundaries between Elon Musk’s companies are growing increasingly blurred through shared capital, talent and infrastructure. Investors must decide what that ecosystem is worth.

title: Amazon Raises C$14 Billion in Record Canadian Dollar Bond Sale
title_cn: 亚马逊发行创纪录的加元债券筹集 140 亿加元
summary: Amazon.com Inc. sold C$14 billion ($10 billion) of Canadian dollar high-grade bonds, the largest corporate debt offering on record in the currency, after drawing about twice that amount in demand.

title: Tech Earnings Are on Fire, Golub Says
title_cn: 戈卢布表示，科技股的盈利正在火爆
summary: Jonathan Golub of Seaport Global Holdings says "earnings are absolutely on fire," and valuations are lower almost everywhere. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Key Takeaways From Apple's WWDC 2026 Event
title_cn: Apple WWDC 2026 活动的要点
summary: Apple unveiled its new intelligence system — underpinned by Google technology —  during a keynote presentation at the company’s Worldwide Developers Conference. Ed Ludlow breaks down what you need to know. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Downplays Concerns That Its Use of Google AI Models Will Undermine Privacy
title_cn: 苹果淡化了对其使用谷歌人工智能模型会损害隐私的担忧
summary: Apple Inc., which just unveiled a revamped artificial intelligence platform built in part with Google technology, said the new approach will still preserve the company’s privacy safeguards.

title: NZ Commits to First LNG Import Plant Despite Gas Price Surge
title_cn: 尽管天然气价格飙升，新西兰仍致力于建设第一座液化天然气进口工厂
summary: The New Zealand government will take the next step to build the country’s first liquefied natural gas import facility, sticking with its plan to bolster energy security despite the surge in global gas prices due to the Iran war.

title: Siri Co-Founder Calls Apple's Update a 'Great First Step'
title_cn: Siri 联合创始人称苹果的更新是“伟大的第一步”
summary: Dag Kittlaus, co-founder of Siri, reacts to Apple's AI ambitions. The new Apple Intelligence system was unveiled during a keynote presentation at the company’s Worldwide Developers Conference. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Discussion on the Iconoclast Dinner Experience and Its Cultural Impact
title_cn: 讨论反传统晚餐体验及其文化影响
summary: Esi Eggleston Bracey, former Unilever Global Chief Growth & Marketing Officer, shared her involvement with the Iconoclast dinner experience, highlighting its significance as a coveted event in the culinary world. She described how the event, founded by Dr. Lezli Levene-Harvell, has been developed over eleven years to identify and bring together top influencers and power players in culinary cuisine. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brookfield's Rashid Not Surprised by Tech Selloff
title_cn: 布鲁克菲尔德的拉希德对科技股抛售并不感到惊讶
summary: Brookfield Head of AI Infrastructure and Head of Europe Sikander Rashid joins Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie to kick off London Tech Week as part of Bloomberg Brief.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ETF IQ 6/8/2026
summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: Procuream Co-Founder & CEO Andrew Chanin, Life + Liberty Indexes Founder Perth Tolle, and DoubleLine Portfolio Manager Morris Chen. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Removes Amazon Satellite Launch Deadline Amid Rocket Shortage
title_cn: 由于火箭短缺，美国取消了亚马逊卫星发射最后期限
summary: Amazon.com Inc. was relieved of a government deadline to have half of its planned satellite constellation up and running by next month, delaying the risk that regulators might suddenly curb the broadband internet operation.

title: Indonesia Moves to Expand Police Role in Civilian Government
title_cn: 印度尼西亚采取行动扩大警察在文职政府中的作用
summary: Indonesia will allow police officers to legally hold civilian administrative positions, a move that could increase the role of security officials in government.

title: Iran, Israel Pledge to End Attacks That Threatened Talks
title_cn: 伊朗和以色列承诺停止威胁会谈的袭击
summary: Iran and Israel agreed to ease strikes against each other after a flare-up in violence threatened to derail peace negotiations and led President Donald Trump to appeal for de-escalation.

title: ‘Skillful Populism’ Has Swiss Set for Tight Population Cap Vote
title_cn: “熟练的民粹主义”让瑞士面临紧缩的人口上限投票
summary: Switzerland is set for a nail-biter vote on a proposal to cap the population at 10 million, after a two-pronged push by campaigners that paired a polished appeal to sustainability-minded moderates with harsher anti-immigrant messaging.

title: Alibaba, Baidu Accused by Pentagon of Aiding China Military
title_cn: 五角大楼指责阿里巴巴和百度援助中国军方
summary: The Pentagon accused some of China’s biggest companies, including Alibaba Group Holding Ltd., Baidu Inc. and BYD Co. of supporting the Chinese military, doubling down on an earlier decision to label crown jewels of the country’s corporate world as threats to US national security.

title: Knicks Fall to Spurs in First Home Finals Game in a Generation
title_cn: 尼克斯队在一代人以来的第一场主场总决赛中输给马刺队
summary: The tickets were priced as high as six figures, but money is no guarantee of happiness.

title: Singapore Pivots From Baby Incentives as Fertility Rate Hits Low
title_cn: 随着生育率下降，新加坡放弃婴儿激励措施
summary: Singapore Prime Minister Lawrence Wong said his government will focus on making life better for families and rely less on incentives to encourage citizens to have more babies, as the city-state grapples with a record-low fertility rate.

title: Becerra, Hilton Advance in California Governor Election, DDHQ Projects
title_cn: Becerra、希尔顿在加州州长选举中取得进展，DDHQ 项目
summary: The race for California governor is on track for a two-person runoff in November between veteran Democratic politician Xavier Becerra and Republican Steve Hilton, a British-born television personality endorsed by President Donald Trump.

title: Xi Pledges Deeper Ties With Kim While Avoiding Nuclear Issue
title_cn: 习近平承诺与金正恩深化关系，同时避免核问题
summary: President Xi Jinping vowed to expand China’s trade, agriculture and technology cooperation with North Korea, while avoiding public mentions of its neighbor’s nuclear program in a meeting with Kim Jong Un in Pyongyang.

title: UN Says Children Are Dying in Cuba Because of Strict US Sanctions
title_cn: 联合国表示，由于美国的严格制裁，古巴儿童正在死亡
summary: Tighter US sanctions on Cuba have led to a spike in infant mortality and plummeting survival rates for child cancer patients, the United Nations warned in one of its strongest rebukes of Washington’s pressure campaign against the island.

title: Malaysia Islamist Party Breaks With Ally, Jolting Opposition
title_cn: 马来西亚伊斯兰党与盟友决裂，震动反对派
summary: Malaysia’s largest Islamist party has moved to sever formal ties with its ally, deepening a rift within the opposition bloc ahead of the next general election.

title: Balance of Power: Late Edition 6/8/2026
title_cn: 权力平衡：最新版 6/8/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Sen. Roger Marshall (R) Kansas, Atlantic Council’s Eurasia Center Distinguished Fellow Ambassador William Taylor, Rep. Raja Krishnamoorthi (D) Illinois, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Democracy Visiting Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Michigan, Canada Plan Opening of Bridge Trump Threatened to Block
title_cn: 密歇根州和加拿大计划开通大桥 特朗普威胁要阻止
summary: Officials in the US and Canada are planning a ribbon-cutting ceremony in the coming days for a new C$6.4 billion ($4.6 billion) bridge linking Michigan to the province of Ontario, which President Donald Trump threatened to block earlier this year.

title: Treasury Asked to Clarify Fast-Growing ETF Tax-Busting Strategy
title_cn: 财政部被要求澄清快速增长的 ETF 避税策略
summary: The Investment Company Institute has asked the US Treasury Department for guidance on a fast-growing ETF strategy that allows investors to sidestep immediate capital-gains taxes, as uncertainty grows over how regulators view the practice.

title: Sen. Marshall Sees Case for Recourse in Weaponization Claims
title_cn: 参议员马歇尔认为武器化索赔有追索权
summary: Sen. Roger Marshall (R-KS) says he would support "some type of recourse" for people targeted by the federal government, but wants limits to exclude violent offenders, emphasizing his support would be contingent on details. He also discusses FISA, reconciliation and the threat of screwworm cases to US cattle supplies with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Amb. Taylor: Ukraine is Winning the War
title_cn: 前大使。泰勒：乌克兰正在赢得战争
summary: Former US Ambassador to Ukraine William Taylor says Ukraine is winning the war, pointing to battlefield gains, deeper strikes inside Russia and pressure on Vladimir Putin's economy. He also discusses US support for Kyiv and calls for stronger weapons, sanctions and backing for Ukraine with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Krishnamoorthi: FISA at Risk Over Pulte Pick
title_cn: 众议员 Krishnamoorthi：FISA 面临普尔特选择的风险
summary: Democratic Rep. Raja Krishnamoorthi of Illinois says President Trump should pull Bill Pulte as acting director of national intelligence to save FISA, warning he does not see Democrats backing reauthorization if Pulte remains in the position. The House Intelligence Committee member also discusses OpenAI, AI regulation, US-China tech competition and the Iran conflict with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Peru’s Diaspora Emerges as Tie-Breaker in Razor-Edge Presidential Race
title_cn: 秘鲁侨民成为刀锋总统竞选中的决胜者
summary: Peru’s presidential election is so tight that it’ll likely be citizens abroad, rather than those from within the country, who will break the tie.

title: Bolivia President Signs Law to Toughen Crackdown on Protests
title_cn: 玻利维亚总统签署法律加强对抗议活动的镇压
summary: Bolivia’s embattled President Rodrigo Paz signed a measure that clears the way for a more aggressive crackdown on anti-government protests that have rocked the South American country for more than five weeks.

title: Apple Announces AI Revamp as Chip Stocks Soar| Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/8/2026
title_cn: 随着芯片股飙升，苹果宣布人工智能改造|彭博商业周刊日报 6/8/2026
summary: Today, Ed Ludlow from Apple's Worldwide Developers Conference in Cupertino, as the tech giant announces a reworked AI slate, including a revamped Siri. Then, LinkedIn head of economics, Americas Kory Kantenga,  discusses the labor market as businesses and new grads feels the impact of AI. Plus, author and podcast host Ruthie Rogers talks food culture and her new book 'Table 4 at the River Cafe.' Also, Lisa Abramowicz talks with Vale CEO Gustavo Pimenta live in Rio de Janeiro (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Latest Midterms Problem Is an Emboldened Iran
title_cn: 特朗普最新的中期选举问题是伊朗的胆大妄为
summary: The US president fails to replicate his Venezuela success in the Middle East.

title: Brazil Court Suspends AtlasIntel Poll Challenged by Bolsonaro
title_cn: 巴西法院暂停博尔索纳罗质疑的 AtlasIntel 民意调查
summary: Brazil’s electoral court suspended the circulation of an AtlasIntel poll that showed Senator Flávio Bolsonaro losing ground in the presidential race, citing alleged problems with the pollster’s methodology.

title: Trump’s $100,000 H-1B Visa Application Fee Rejected by Judge
title_cn: 特朗普 10 万美元的 H-1B 签证申请费被法官拒绝
summary: A federal judge struck down a $100,000 fee President Donald Trump ordered for H-1B visa applications, providing a reprieve for US technology companies that rely on hiring skilled foreign workers. Michael Shepard explains  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Picks Blanche as Attorney General, Senate Fight Looms
title_cn: 特朗普选择布兰奇担任司法部长，参议院之争迫在眉睫
summary: President Donald Trump nominated Acting US Attorney General Todd Blanche to fill the position on a permanent basis, rewarding a loyal ally whose controversial actions ensure an uphill Senate confirmation fight.

title: Jefferies Returns From Caracas Saying Dollar Flows May Lift Debt
title_cn: 杰富瑞从加拉加斯返回称美元流动可能会解除债务
summary: Venezuela’s economy is poised for an influx of foreign investment that could support higher bond prices, according to a Wall Street analyst who visited the country last week.

title: Vale CEO Sees No Demand Destruction in Metals Markets
title_cn: 淡水河谷首席执行官认为金属市场需求不会受到破坏
summary: Vale SA Chief Executive Officer Gustavo Pimenta says he sees no evidence of demand destruction in global metal markets despite war in the Middle East. In fact, he sees growth in demand around the world. He speaks to Bloomberg's Lisa Abramowicz.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran, Israel Pledge to End Attacks | Balance of Power 6/8/2026
title_cn: 伊朗和以色列承诺停止袭击权力平衡 6/8/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest news from the Trump Administration. On today's show, American Enterprise Institute Nonresident Senior Fellow Heather Conley, Republican Congressman James Comer, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and former Republican Congressman Denver Riggleman. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Peru Vote Is Too Close To Call As Fujimori's Lead Narrows
title_cn: 秘鲁投票结果势均力敌，藤森领先优势缩小
summary: Peru’s bitterly contested presidential election remained too close to call as conservative Keiko Fujimori’s razor-thin lead over leftist candidate Roberto Sánchez narrowed with votes still being counted. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Urges Thune to Fire US Senate Rules Referee ‘Immediately’
title_cn: 特朗普敦促图恩“立即”解雇美国参议院规则裁判
summary: Donald Trump called on Senate Majority Leader John Thune to fire the Senate’s top rules keeper after one of her decisions thwarted the president’s efforts to attach voter identification legislation to a budget package.
